description: LDSA-mode k sweep for Incomplete-LayerABS on VNN-COMP ERAN.
name: table12_incomplete_vnncomp_ldsa_k_sweep
notes: The current public controller path exposes the paper's single-interaction setting, not the LDSA alternation mode used in Table 12.
The paper's VNN-COMP ERAN 5x100 and 8x100 correspond to the code variants `vnncomp_6x100` and `vnncomp_9x100`, because the code counts the output layer in the architecture label.
title: Incomplete-LayerABS LDSA k sweep on VNN-COMP ERAN
